name: Christmas Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line three 9-inch cake pans with waxed paper.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; set aside.
4. In a larger bowl, cream together butter or margarine and shortening with sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add yolks and vanilla extract to the butter mixture; mix well.
6. Gradually add flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, buttermilk, shredded coconut, and chopped walnuts to the batter. Mix thoroughly.
7. Gently fold in beaten egg whites alternately with the dry ingredients until combined.
8. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow cakes to cool in pans for about 10 minutes before removing them and letting them cool completely on wire racks.
11. Prepare frosting by combining softened cream cheese, confectioners' sugar, and butter in a bowl. Beat until smooth.
12. Add chopped maraschino cherries and stir gently into the frosting.
13. Frost the cooled cake layers with the prepared frosting.
